chunks.title: Call to Justice and Sabbath Keeping
chunks.reason: An introductory call to action emphasizing righteousness and Sabbath observance.

chunks.title: Promise for Foreigners and Eunuchs
chunks.reason: A prophetic assurance that foreigners and eunuchs will be included in God's covenant community.

chunks.title: Gathering of the Banished and Beasts
chunks.reason: A declaration of further gathering for Israel followed by a summons to wild beasts.

chunks.title: Condemnation of Blind Shepherds
chunks.reason: A critique of the leaders' blindness and greed, ending with their self-indulgent speech.
